claim: No Stable, release, conformance, manual assistive-technology, package-parity, or publication claim is made by this source contract.

semantics.rolePolicy: No group, toolbar, list, or navigation semantics are inferred from visual alignment.

layout.intrinsic: A wrapping one-dimensional flex row uses semantic inline gaps.
layout.logicalDirection: start and end follow the computed inline direction.
layout.overflow: Wrapping is mandatory; root and direct children have zero minimum inline size without clipping.

consumerResponsibilities: Add the correct semantic parent or role when content is a list, toolbar, or navigation region.
Do not use CSS order to diverge visual and reading order.
Ensure intrinsically unbreakable child content has its own accessible overflow or wrapping policy.
